hyperedges.label: Self-healing CI automation loop using BOT_GH_PAT
Workflows required to succeed before auto-merge
Mac/Windows scripts kept behaviorally in sync for backup and restore flows

nodes.label: Open a PR for Claude's branch step
nodes.norm_label: open a pr for claude's branch step

nodes.label: Co-authored-by trailer suppression via claude_args
nodes.rationale: claude-code-action always appends a Co-authored-by trailer with no dedicated toggle input; this previously downgraded commits from 'Verified' to 'Partially verified' on GitHub since the bot-signed commit got credited to an unrelated triggering user, so an explicit --append-system-prompt counter-instruction is used instead.

nodes.label: No path filter on pull_request trigger
nodes.rationale: auto-merge.yml gates PR merges on lint.yml completing by name for the PR's head SHA; a path filter that skipped a PR would make auto-merge wait forever on a run that never happens, so every PR must trigger this workflow regardless of what it touches.
nodes.norm_label: no path filter on pull_request trigger

nodes.label: Restore flow (repo -> save folder)
nodes.rationale: Restore skips the backup-only save-path-exists/readable/non-empty checks because the live save may legitimately be missing/empty when restoring onto a fresh machine; pre-restore safety copies are intentionally left in place as the user's undo path.

nodes.label: PAT-over-GITHUB_TOKEN automation design
nodes.rationale: Deliberately uses secrets.BOT_GH_PAT instead of default GITHUB_TOKEN or a personal PAT wherever one workflow needs to trigger another, to keep @claude-mention and Fixes #N auto-close linkages working and to attribute commits/merges/comments to the bot rather than a human, creating a self-healing CI-failure -> @claude -> fix -> CI -> auto-merge loop.

hyperedges.label: Self-healing CI automation loop using BOT_GH_PAT
